## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Linked issue

<!-- Closes #NN, or "design discussion in #NN" -->

## Type

<!-- Check one -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — build / tooling / repo housekeeping
- [ ] `refactor` — internal restructure, no behavior change
- [ ] `test` — adding or updating tests
- [ ] `ci` — CI pipeline change

## Checklist

- [ ] Read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and follows the coding standards
- [ ] Layer boundaries respected (model is Qt-free; only `controller/model_bridge.py` bridges events)
- [ ] Tests added or updated where it makes sense
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if user-visible behavior changes
- [ ] No copied Star Trek media; AI-generated assets respect the IP boundary in [`NOTICE.md`](../NOTICE.md)
